prestazioni: VK56VD 5.6L V8 engine (390hp stock) upgraded with a Stillen supercharger kit (Gen 3, 10psi boost) paired with a custom AEM Infinity 8 standalone ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping, supporting E85 flex-fuel capability with ID1000x injectors and a Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump

Full bolt-on VK56VD exhaust system featuring a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe (catless) by Tomei, paired with a Borla Pro XS cat-back exhaust (dual 4" tips) and a GReddy SP2 intercooler for sustained power under boost

Suspension overhaul with KW Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable damping) and Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (25mm front, 30mm rear) to eliminate scrub radius, paired with polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension for improved chassis rigidity
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Stillen Armada-specific kit (fiberglass fenders, extended rocker panels) with a matte vinyl wrap in Nissan "Thunder Blue" (color code: B42) and carbon fiber side skirts from Seibon
Front end restyle with a custom 3D-printed grille insert (honeycomb mesh) and LED headlight retrofit using Morimoto XB LED bulbs (5500K) with a Diode Dynamics switchback halo kit for turn signals

Rear cargo area transformation into a "VIP lounge" with custom Alcantara-wrapped rear seats (reclining, heated/cooled), a 40" Samsung The Frame TV mounted on a hydraulic lift, and a Sony XM5 sound system with Kicker QS650.4 amplifiers
